description: Legal fragment in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe. Dating: Mentions 1444 of the Seleucid era (= 1132/1133 CE). Involves two people reaching an agreement over monthly payments. Mentions Avraham al-Wakīl, [...] b. Khallūf and Abū l-Ḥasan. (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
